name: Freedom Preserving Protocol — Trust & Handshake
description: Agent-to-agent trust graph with BFS propagation, constitutional handshake sequence, signed claims, Merkle audit bridging, and strict-mode signaling. Enables multi-agent verification of FPP adoption.

constitutionHash.description: SHA-256 of the constitution.json this agent has adopted. Used during handshake verification.

trustAttenuationFactor.description: Per-hop trust attenuation for BFS propagation. 0.8 means 20% reduction per hop.

handshakeTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time (ms) for a handshake session before it expires.

maxPropagationDepth.description: Maximum BFS depth for trust propagation.

trustGraphPath.description: Path to the persisted trust graph JSON file.

identityKeyPath.description: Path to the Ed25519 identity key seed file (mode 0600). Generated on first run.

auditLogPath.description: Path to the constitution audit JSONL log for Merkle root computation.

strictModeStatePath.description: Path to the strict-mode session state file read by the enforcement plugin.

requireSignedClaims.description: When true, handshake verification rejects claims without a valid Ed25519 signature.

requireMerkleProof.description: When true, handshake verification requires a valid Merkle proof of recent audit entries.

strictModeOnHandshakeFailure.description: When true, a failed or UNKNOWN handshake triggers strict mode for that session.

strictModeTtlMs.description: How long strict mode lasts (ms) before auto-expiring.

strictModeAddApprovalOn.description: Risk classifications that become require-approval during strict mode.
